text: carbs is 46g. but the real story is the context, not the nutrition profile.

pros first. meaningfully better than typical candy because the misc ranking should reward better swaps, not just raw perfection. clear real-world role because if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. context tells the real story because that is the whole point of misc.

now the downsides. still very much a dense treat because it cannot escape being a treat food just because it is darker. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.
Dark Chocolate 85% is B tier. Best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
